mapper.select: SELECT merchant.id AS merchantId, merchant.shop_name AS merchantName, ma.member_code AS merchantCode, spu.id AS spuId, spu.spu_name AS spuName, sku.id AS skuId, sku.sku_name AS skuName, sku.spec_text AS specText, sku.base_price AS basePrice, COALESCE(sales.salesQty, 0) AS salesQty, COALESCE(sales.salesAmount, 0) AS salesAmount, COALESCE(sales.orderCount, 0) AS orderCount, auth.auth_status AS authStatus, auth.created_time AS authTime FROM supplier_goods_authorization auth JOIN member_account ma ON ma.id = auth.merchant_id AND ma.deleted = 0 AND ma.member_type = 'MERCHANT' AND ma.status = 'ENABLED' JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.member_id = ma.id AND merchant.deleted = 0 AND merchant.status = 'ENABLED' JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = auth.supplier_sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT oi.sku_id, oi.merchant_id, SUM(oi.quantity) AS salesQty, SUM(oi.final_amount) AS salesAmount, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS orderCount FROM order_item oi JOIN order_info oi_order ON oi_order.id = oi.order_id AND oi_order.order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'CLOSED') WHERE oi.deleted = 0 GROUP BY oi.sku_id, oi.merchant_id ) sales ON sales.sku_id = sku.id AND sales.merchant_id = merchant.id WHERE auth.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND auth.auth_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY sales.salesQty DESC, merchant.shop_name ASC, spu.spu_name ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supplier_goods_authorization auth JOIN member_account ma ON ma.id = auth.merchant_id AND ma.deleted = 0 AND ma.member_type = 'MERCHANT' AND ma.status = 'ENABLED' JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.member_id = ma.id AND merchant.deleted = 0 AND merchant.status = 'ENABLED' JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = auth.supplier_sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT oi.sku_id, oi.merchant_id, SUM(oi.quantity) AS salesQty, SUM(oi.final_amount) AS salesAmount, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS orderCount FROM order_item oi JOIN order_info oi_order ON oi_order.id = oi.order_id AND oi_order.order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'CLOSED') WHERE oi.deleted = 0 GROUP BY oi.sku_id, oi.merchant_id ) sales ON sales.sku_id = sku.id AND sales.merchant_id = merchant.id WHERE auth.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND auth.auth_status = 'ACTIVE'
